"'''Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO'''" was a source article appearing in ''[[Polyhedron 170]]''. It was written by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Abel G. Peña]] and illustrated by [[Jeffery Carlisle]]. The article covered the events of the ''[[Trigon One]]'' cycle of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']], expanding on the backstory of the characters and giving RPG statistics for characters and vehicles.

==Contents==
*Introduction
*[[Boonta/Legends|Boonta]] Bounty
*[[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] and [[Jord Dusat]]
*[[Kea Moll]]

*The [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]]

*Vehicles and Ships
**[[White Witch]]
**[[Silver Speeder]]
**[[Sand Sloth]]
*[[Alien Anthology]] Addendum
**[[Annoo-dat Blue]] (Ret)

*New Planets
**[[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]]
**[[Annoo (Gelefil)|Annoo]] (Gelefil)
**[[Boonta/Legends|Ko Vari]] (Boonta)
